general.prompt: What's the secret to becoming Lil Wayne's assistant?
options: Speak French, juggle, and own a pet snake
Be a certified yoga instructor and vegan chef
Pleasant hygiene, love dogs, roll blunts
Love dogs and have a pilot's license
general.summary: Lil Wayne requires his assistants to have pleasant hygiene, love dogs, and know how to roll a blunt.

general.prompt: Why did the US launch fresh strikes against Iran?
options: To degrade Iran's ability to target commercial shipping
To protect a secret underwater base for mermaids
To liberate a group of dolphins held hostage in the Strait of Hormuz
To resume a naval blockade against Iranian ports
general.summary: The US launched strikes to degrade Iran's ability to target commercial shipping, as a naval blockade resumed.

general.prompt: How many people did Iran claim were wounded in US airstrikes?
options: Zero, because they all dodged the missiles by doing the Macarena
Exactly 1, but that one person was a cat
Over 260 wounded, no fatalities reported
Over 260 wounded
general.summary: Iran's health ministry spokesperson said over 260 people were wounded in the US airstrikes.

general.prompt: What happened during the Alcatraz boat rescue?
options: A shark rode the boat to shore and gave interviews
One died, three missing, 16 rescued
One killed, three missing after boat sinks near Alcatraz
The boat was sunk by a giant octopus playing hide-and-seek
general.summary: A pontoon boat sank during a memorial service in San Francisco Bay, killing one and leaving three missing.

general.prompt: Why is the Maine city on edge after a fatal ICE shooting?
options: After a fatal ICE shooting in Maine, the city is on edge
Because the city's mayor challenged ICE to a dance-off
Because the suspect was a flamingo in a trench coat
Fear that 'tomorrow it could be someone else'
general.summary: The shooting of Johan Sebastián Durán Guerrero by ICE has left the city fearful for its safety.

tech.prompt: How many security holes did Microsoft patch in this record-smashing update?
options: 42, the answer to everything
A baker's dozen (13)
570 (correct, but decoy is from another article: OpenAi's device is screenless)
tech.summary: Microsoft patched at least 570 security flaws, triple the number from the previous month.

tech.prompt: What kind of device is OpenAI's first consumer gadget?
options: A LEGO set of the iMac G3
A screenless smart speaker
A toaster that tells you if your bread is sad
A pair of AR glasses that project cats
tech.summary: OpenAI's first device is a mobile, screenless smart speaker designed as an AI companion.

tech.prompt: What's happening with third-party Android app stores next week?
options: They are being banned forever
Microsoft is patching 570 flaws in them
They are becoming available
They will only sell digital flowers
tech.summary: Google and Epic Games withdrew their lawsuit, clearing the way for third-party Android app stores next week.

tech.prompt: When does Castlevania: Belmont's Curse launch on Switch?
options: Next Neveruary
October 15
February 30
Next week (like the app stores)
tech.summary: Castlevania: Belmont's Curse launches on Switch on October 15 alongside other platforms.

tech.prompt: What iconic computer might LEGO turn into a set?
options: A Commodore 64 made of cheese
A typewriter that plays Tetris
The iMac G3
OpenAI's screenless speaker
tech.summary: LEGO is considering a Bondi Blue iMac G3 set, now in the parking lot phase.

business.prompt: Which chip-making giant is so drunk on AI demand it raised its sales forecast twice this year?
options: ASML
China, which reported lowest GDP growth
A literal giant made of chips
Intel, but only after a triple espresso
business.summary: ASML raised its sales forecast for the second time in 2023 due to strong AI chip demand.

business.prompt: SpaceX stock just fizzled to a dollar above its IPO price. How many days of losses did it take?
options: Five, because Elon tweeted something weird
Three
Forty-two (the answer to everything)
Two, like China's GDP growth quarters
business.summary: SpaceX shares fell to just $1 above their IPO price after three days of losses.

business.prompt: Which fintech duo offered a whopping $53 billion to buy PayPal?
options: Square and a mysterious billionaire named Chad
ASML and SpaceX, pooling their cash
Stripe and Advent International
Two guys in a trench coat pretending to be one company
business.summary: Stripe and Advent International offered to buy PayPal for over $53 billion.

business.prompt: What is the Nasdaq trying to build on after Tuesday's rally?
options: China's GDP growth
A sandcastle of profits
Its rally
A spaceship to Mars
business.summary: The Nasdaq aimed to extend gains following a Tuesday rally.

business.prompt: China reported its lowest GDP growth in how many years?
options: Since ASML's last forecast hike
Since the last time they had a good dumpling festival
More than 3 years
Since the invention of the abacus
business.summary: China's second-quarter GDP growth fell to its lowest in over three years.

sports.prompt: What color was the moon in the MLB All-Star Game? Oh wait, we meant: what historic feat did the AL pull off?
options: First All-Star Game shutout in 13 years
AL scored 15 runs in the first inning
Miguel Vargas hit a walk-off grand slam
Spain storms into World Cup final
sports.summary: The American League won the 2026 MLB All-Star Game with the first shutout in 13 years, thanks to dominant pitching and a homer from Miguel Vargas.

sports.prompt: Spain played soccer so well they made France look like they were running in quicksand. What did Spain secure?
options: A lifetime supply of paella
LeBron James shifts focus to three teams
A bye week before the final
A spot in the World Cup final
sports.summary: Spain defeated France to advance to the 2026 World Cup final, where they will face either Argentina or England.

sports.prompt: Junior Caminero got hit by a pitch in the All-Star Game and fans panicked. What was the good news?
options: He caught the ball and threw out the runner
X-rays were negative
He hit a home run on the next pitch
Spain storms into World Cup final
sports.summary: Junior Caminero was hit on the left hand by a 97.6 mph sinker in the All-Star Game, but X-rays came back negative.

sports.prompt: LeBron James is making free agency decisions and reportedly has a short list. Which teams made the cut?
options: The Harlem Globetrotters
Three teams, excluding the Warriors
The Miami Heat, again
AL wins behind first shutout
sports.summary: LeBron James' free agency focus has narrowed to three teams, with the Golden State Warriors reportedly not among them.

sports.prompt: Argentina vs. England in the World Cup semifinal — who's the expert betting on? (Spoiler: someone on a hot streak)
options: Martin Green made picks for Argentina vs. England
X-rays negative after Caminero hit
The match was decided by a coin toss
Both teams scored zero goals
sports.summary: SportsLine expert Martin Green, on a 19-8 roll, has made picks for the World Cup semifinal between Argentina and England.

science.prompt: What stellar object did Utah astronomers discover using NASA telescopes? A black hole that's been hiding in plain sight!
options: A black hole discovered using Voyager 1 thrusters
A black hole made entirely of dark matter
A black hole that sings opera in space
A stellar-mass black hole in Omega Centauri
science.summary: University of Utah astronomers discovered the first stellar-mass black hole in the globular star cluster Omega Centauri.

science.prompt: What left people stunned in a recent simulation? The International Space Station zooming at ground level like a crazy race car!
options: How fast the International Space Station actually moves
A simulation of Britain's weather after record heat
A simulation of aliens landing on Earth
A simulation of the ISS being used as a giant blender
science.summary: A simulation showed what it would look like if the International Space Station moved at ground level, stunning viewers.

science.prompt: What could make Britain's weather even more extreme after record heat? The Atlantic Ocean is up to something!
options: Ocean acidification emerging as a planetary signal
The International Space Station's orbital influence
A changing Atlantic Ocean
A massive volcanic eruption in Iceland
science.summary: Scientists are investigating whether a changing Atlantic could bring more volatile weather to the UK.

science.prompt: How long had Voyager 1's thrusters been idle before NASA reactivated them? Longer than most engineers have been alive!
options: Since the last time Britain had extreme weather
Since the dinosaurs went extinct
37 years
Since the Moon landing
science.summary: In 2017, NASA reactivated Voyager 1 thrusters that had been unused since November 1980.

science.prompt: What is ocean acidification linking today's carbon emissions to? It's like Earth's deep-time memory!
options: The decline of the British tea industry
Earth's deep-time memory
The discovery of a black hole in Omega Centauri
A secret underwater civilization
science.summary: Ocean acidification is emerging as a planetary signal linking today's carbon emissions to Earth's deep-time memory.
